scripts.spec: docker compose exec web python manage.py spectacular --file openapi-schema.yaml && docker compose exec web cat openapi-schema.yaml > frontend/openapi-schema.yaml
scripts.sync: npm run spec && npm run types
scripts.validate: docker compose exec web python manage.py spectacular --validate --fail-on-warn
scripts.migrate: docker compose exec web python manage.py migrate
scripts.test: docker compose exec web python manage.py test
scripts.fresh: npm run build && npm run up && npm run migrate && npm run sync
